name: Arrow Electronics, Inc
h1: Arrow Electronics's GCC footprint in India
lede: Arrow Electronics runs eight capability centers across seven Indian cities. Bengaluru, Ahmedabad, Chennai, Hyderabad, Indore, Noida and Pune, covering engineering & design and gcc/gic, built over 24 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Arrow Electronics office in India. We map eight, across seven cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Arrow Electronics, Inc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Arrow Electronics runs 8 verified GCC centers across 7 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Ahmedabad, Chennai, Hyderabad, Indore, Noida, Pune), covering engineering & design and gcc/gic. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

titles.title: Vice President & Head - Global Enterprise Services Center

about.description: Arrow Electronics's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Ahmedabad, Chennai, Hyderabad, Indore, Noida and Pune, spanning engineering & design and gcc/gic. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Electronic Components and Accessories, Electronics Manufacturing

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all nine decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Arrow Electronics operate in India?
faq.a: Arrow Electronics operates 8 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Arrow Electronics have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Arrow Electronics's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Ahmedabad, Chennai, Hyderabad, Indore, Noida and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Arrow Electronics run in India?
faq.a: Arrow Electronics runs engineering & design and gcc/gic centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Arrow Electronics's India GCCs?
faq.a: Arrow Electronics's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Arrow Electronics's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 9 leaders at Arrow Electronics's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
